title: Construction Near Red Square
description: Temporary sidewalk narrowing and detour signs in place.

title: Power Outage Resolved
description: Elevator service has resumed at Kane Hall.

title: Small fire extinguished at Fluke Hall (CoMotion Hardware Incubator, Room 215); area reopening
description: Seattle firefighters responded to a small fire at the CoMotion Hardware Incubator in Fluke Hall (Room 215), believed to have been caused by a battery. The fire has been extinguished and the battery was removed from the building. No injuries were reported. Mason Road near Fluke Hall was blocked during the response. The area is reopening; avoid the area as needed while access returns to normal.
